name: Vivian
research_note: kingshotwiki 404. Primary: kingshot-data + Perplexity synthesis. | 9x3x3 update: 2nd source added from lootbar.gg/blog/en/kingshot-gen-5-heroes-guide.html — kingshot-data + lootbar.gg Gen 5/6 guide convergence confirmed on mechanics and max values (tier-by-tier scaling remains kingshot-data single-source for some fields).

base_stats.notable: New highest Attack documented (5987). Gen 5 introduces ±444.35% Expedition multiplier.

conquest.name: Gilded Barrage
conquest.description: Vivian fires a coin bullet at the enemy back row (heroes first), dealing AOE damage and reducing targets' Attack Speed by 50% for 2 seconds.

conquest.name: Lucky Strike
conquest.description: Vivian fires at an enemy (heroes first), dealing damage with a 50% chance to deal double damage.

conquest.name: Priceless Shot
conquest.description: Vivian unleashes a devastating hail of massive coin bullets, dealing damage per second to enemies within range for 3 seconds.

expedition.name: Crouching Tiger
expedition.description: All squads' attacks increase enemy damage taken.

expedition.name: Focus Fire
expedition.description: After every 4 attacks, Vivian deals 100% extra damage to all enemies, and the target takes 15% extra damage on its next hit.
expedition.scaling_note: Max values verified across 3 sources but tier-by-tier scaling not available in community sources.
sources: ldshop.gg/blog/kingshot/gen-5-heroes-guide (Focus Fire: After every 4 attacks, deal 100% extra damage to all enemies, and the target takes 15% extra damage on its next hit)
lootbar.gg/blog/en/kingshot-gen-5-heroes-guide (Focus Fire: After every 4 attacks, deals 100% extra damage to all enemies)
heaven-guardian.com/kingshot-gen-5-heroes-thrud-long-fei-vivian-guide (target will receive 15% extra damage for its next attack received. This happens after every four attacks)

expedition.name: Trap of Greed
expedition.description: Deals 60% extra damage to all enemies on the next attack of every four attacks. This is a DISTINCT skill from Focus Fire — both trigger 'every 4 attacks' but have different effects.
expedition.scaling_note: Max values verified. Tier-by-tier not available.
sources: heaven-guardian.com/kingshot-gen-5-heroes-thrud-long-fei-vivian-guide (Trap of Greed: Deals 60% extra damage to all enemies on the next attack of every four attacks)

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Refined Gunplay
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Deals damage to a random enemy (heroes first) each time a skill is cast. Unlocked only when Lucky Spinner is equipped.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Money Driven
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Big rewards fuel great bravery, increasing the Defense of defender troops. Unlocked only when Lucky Spinner is equipped.

exclusive_gear.name: Lucky Spinner
exclusive_gear.notes: Highest exclusive gear power documented (499,500). First documented hero with Escort bonuses in the exclusive gear.

order: Crouching Tiger first (+25% enemy damage taken amp)
Then Focus Fire (100% extra every 4 attacks)
Then Trap of Greed (60% extra every 4)

gear_recommendations.reasoning: Standard archer archetype at legendary tier. Derived from community gear build templates (allclash.com Zoe guide as canonical base for infantry, confirmed by community consensus across allclash, heaven-guardian, kingshothandbook build guides).
sources: allclash.com Zoe build guide (canonical infantry template)

lineup_inferences.note: Vivian + Amadeus lead. Army-wide buff makes her the ideal rally co-lead.

best_partners.theoretical_synergy: Vivian is one of the most impactful heroes in the game per heroes.js — the only S+ Rally tier. Her 3-second Priceless Shot DPS skill plus her Gilded Barrage back-row AOE with Attack Speed reduction make her devastating in arena. Community calls her an Arena Destroyer.
best_partners.source: kingshothandbook.com effect_op stacking math + community lineup guides

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.

access_methods: Hall of Heroes (Gems or Paid Packs)
f2p_investment.reasoning: heroes.js f2p=false. Acquisition via Hall of Heroes (F2P pool) + Swordland Shop, but community considers her a premium investment.

rally.reasoning: Only hero with S+ tier. Army-wide damage buffs elevate entire rally lineups. Arena Destroyer per community.

lore_background.title: The Arena Destroyer
lore_background.backstory: Lore not directly extracted from available sources. kingshotwiki page 404'd. Community materials focus on gameplay — no backstory surfaced.
lore_background.incomplete_lore_note: Gen 5 heroes all show kingshotwiki 404 issues — Vivian's backstory inaccessible through this research pipeline.

deep_analysis: Vivian is the Arena Destroyer — a Gen 5 Legendary Archer with record-breaking stats and the ONLY S+ Rally tier rating in the entire Kingshot roster. Her base Attack (5987) is the highest documented, and her Expedition multipliers (444.35%) mark the Gen 5 power-creep leap from Gen 4's 370.29%. Her Conquest tree is built around coin-themed firearm skills: Gilded Barrage fires at the enemy back row dealing up to Attack × 252% AOE while reducing targets' Attack Speed by 50%, Lucky Strike deals up to 140% with a 50% chance to double, and Priceless Shot unleashes 3 seconds of sustained DPS at up to Attack × 49% per second. Her Expedition tree amplifies squad damage through stacking debuffs — Crouching Tiger increases enemy damage taken by up to 25%. Her exclusive gear Lucky Spinner holds the new record for gear power (499,500) with +1212 Attack, +999 Defense, +7494 Health, +111% Archer Lethality, +111% Archer Health, and unlocks Refined Gunplay (damage to random enemy on every skill cast) plus Money Driven (+15% defender troops' Defense). Her tier rating is S+ Rally — the only hero in the game with this distinction — plus S-tier Bear Hunt and S-tier Joiner. heroes.js notes her as 'one of the most impactful heroes in the game' providing 'army-wide damage buffs that elevate entire rally lineups.' She's premium-gated (Hall of Heroes via Gems or Paid Packs) and not F2P-recommended. Her lore is not surfaced in any of the sources consulted — Gen 5 heroes appear to have kingshotwiki 404 issues across the board.
unverified_fields: Expedition skills from Perplexity only (kingshot-data missed them)
Focus Fire and Trap of Greed possibly duplicate skills — flag for audit
Focus Fire/Trap of Greed scaling arrays incomplete
